title: MC2 -Ideal Craft-
description: We provide minecraft 2.20.1 with carefully selected items that are truly necessary.
body:
# what is this?
A modpack containing only the mods I think are really necessary.
The balance of the game has been carefully adjusted to ensure that you won't get bored even in the final stages.
The important thing is that we strive to be lightweight compared to other element-adding modpacks.
(As proof of this, the unique loading screens that cause a load are reduced as much as possible.
Resources should be used where they are relevant to the game experience)
Mods are provided for each element, and it is designed to be enjoyed by any mod player.

### Unique data pack
Contains unique data packs and expanded recipes.
In addition to vanilla workbench recipes, many unique recipes for create mods have also been added.
We offer a unique experience.
It is automatically loaded by paxi, so there is no need to open the data pack screen each time.

## Beautiful world generation that you can admire
Terralith makes the biome overwhelmingly beautiful.
In addition, carefully selected structure addition and upgrade mods make exploration overwhelmingly fun.
Optionally enable terratonic on the resource pack screen before world generation for more natural terrain.
Incendium has been added to the Nether, so you should be able to explore it without getting bored.
Check out the gallery to see how it looks.

## Do you want to industrialize?
create mod and many addons have been added.
This will eventually give players the goal of automating all tasks and developing their base.
With add-ons, limit breaking enchantments are also possible. The difficulty level is high, but by combining it with Quark's ancient tome, it is possible to break through the upper limit of up to 2 levels.
In addition, the textures are sophisticated, and you will be able to create item production lines that are stunningly beautiful.
Although this is the end content, you can also run a railway in your town.

## Do you want to enjoy combat?
EpicFight has been added and you can enjoy exciting battles.
It has the element of a skill book and is very powerful if you can collect it.
Don't like EF's animations?
rest assured. In mining mode, animations are turned off by default.
In other words, you can enjoy the same operation feeling as vanilla.
(Of course it comes with animation in battle mode. Yay!)

## Or do you want to live a more peaceful life?
This modpack also has a lot of farming and cooking elements.
### Farmer's Delight
Farmer's Delight adds a number of high quality dishes.
This is a mod that adds crops and is fun just collecting them.
It is also possible to automate it using create, and the immediate goal will be to mass produce powerful food.
(Goodbye, hoglin trap)
### Caupona
Caupona is a cooking mod with no standard recipes.
Recipes are made with more than half vegetables and less than 25% meat, so the degree of freedom is overwhelming.
You can make the best soup server that you can drink at any time by automating redstone and automatic loading with create, and storing it in a liquid state with create.
Mmm, delicious!
### [Temporary information]
We have confirmed a problem that Caupona is not in the system at this time.
Please wait until it is fixed.

## Do you want to be healed by meeting animals?
Alex's mobs, which adds nearly 90 types of mobs, and Friends and Foes, which add mobs that lost in mob voting, have been introduced, and many wild animals have been added.
But be careful, there are also dangerous enemy mobs and boss mobs.

## Not enough adventure?
Then let's set out on a journey to two new dimensions.
Aether is a fantastic world.
It is not difficult to get there, so I recommend this place if you want to go there first.
DeeperAndDarker is a brutal dimension where the premise is to conquer an ancient city.
When they find you, the Warden is called.
Even if you prepare your equipment, you will easily lose...
However, since it is possible to obtain upward compatibility with Netherite, I would like to conquer it eventually.

## Do you want to do architecture?
Adds tons of building blocks, including furniture and its own power system, blocks that imitate other blocks, and more.
Architects won't get bored either.
In addition, interiors with functions such as a globe are also available.

On the other hand, if you are not very good at architecture, try renovating the structures generated in the world.
Just by changing the interior, you can instantly transform your home into a home of your own.

## Want to organize your warehouse?
We recommend Quark's warehouse organization feature.
Also, by pressing the v key, you can directly enter the inventory without opening the gui.
Press and hold to distribute evenly, press ctrl to replenish and import, and shift to import while moving to the right item.

Also, you can easily create a sorting machine with create.

## Want multiplayer?
You can play multiplayer right away with e4mc.
without opening ports.
Please note that the other party must also have the same modpack installed.

# Q&A

### q.Where is the shader reload key?
### a.Try pressing the U key. A collection of various key bindings. You can set the empty space to your liking.
### q.I want to customize the modpack.
### a.Please feel free to do so. However, using Malilib is not recommended. It has been pointed out that it is not compatible with Sinytra. Customize carefully to avoid competition with exquisite taste.
### q.Create mechanism is not displayed in WTHIT.
### a.It's a nuisance so it's blacklisted. (Because the Karakuri block name cannot be displayed)
### q.Is there a version other than 1.20.1 or a fabric version yet?
### a.Not yet. This is difficult due to the large number of mods and the implementation of original data packs.
### q.This is an unfamiliar recipe screen.
### a.We use EMI. There is a recipe tree, which is convenient.
### q.I have a suggestion
### a.Please join our discord server.
